title: juncus acutus subsp. decompositus
intro: Juncus acutus subsp. decompositus, also known as the hard rush, is a type of flowering plant in the rush family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Juncus acutus subsp. decompositus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support respiratory health. Juncus acutus subsp. decompositus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including bronchitis, coughs, and skin conditions.
